parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: Prefix of the API key to delete. Passed in the URL path. This is the first 8 characters of the API key you want to delete. Only these 8 characters are visible in the dashboard (the rest are masked with asterisks). You can also obtain this value via the POST method (see the `prefix` field in its response).

prefix.description: Prefix of the deleted API key.

deleted.description: Indicates whether the key was successfully deleted.
